headline: **MLB Daily Recap: April 12, 2026**
article:
The Arizona Diamondbacks fell short in Philadelphia, losing 3-4 to the Phillies. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense, while Taijuan Walker earned the win with six strikeouts in five innings.

Injuries and availability continue to impact teams, with several notable players landing on the injured list. Tyler O'Neill (Baltimore Orioles) has been placed on the 7-day injured list due to a concussion, while Hunter Harvey (Chicago Cubs) is out with right triceps inflammation. George Springer (Toronto Blue Jays) is on the 10-day injured list with a left great toe fracture, and Adley Rutschman (Baltimore Orioles) is out with left ankle inflammation.

The Philadelphia Phillies bolstered their roster with the acquisition of outfielder Steward Berroa from the Milwaukee Brewers in exchange for cash. The St. Louis Cardinals made two trades, sending LHP Nick Raquet to the Baltimore Orioles for 2B Brayden Smith and acquiring RHP Patrick Galle from the Boston Red Sox. The Toronto Blue Jays also made a trade, acquiring 2B Tyler Fitzgerald from the San Francisco Giants for cash.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Fall Short in Philly**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks dropped a 3-4 decision to the Philadelphia Phillies, with Kyle Schwarber leading the Phillies' offense. Taijuan Walker earned the win for the Phillies, striking out six in five innings of work.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Marlins 6-1**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers secured a 6-1 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Casey Mize earning the win after 5.2 innings of work. Riley Greene led the Tigers' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance, driving in 4 runs.

top_news.title: **Pirates Edge Cubs in Thrilling 4-3 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Pittsburgh Pirates secured a narrow win over the Chicago Cubs, with a final score of 4-3. Braxton Ashcraft led the Pirates' pitching effort, striking out 9 batters in 5 innings.

top_news.title: **Twins Take Down Blue Jays 7-4**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins secured a 7-4 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Joe Ryan earning the win after pitching 7.0 innings with 5 strikeouts and 2 earned runs. Trevor Larnach led the Twins' offense with a home run and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **O'Neill Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Baltimore Orioles right fielder Tyler O'Neill has been placed on the 7-day injured list due to a concussion, with the retroactive date set to April 9, 2026.

top_news.title: **Phillies Acquire Steward Berroa in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies have made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring outfielder Steward Berroa from the Milwaukee Brewers in exchange for cash.
